title: Roblox Sounds And Music
description: Is your game too Minecrafty, or do you like the sounds and music of Roblox? Try this pack!
body:
Is your game too Minecrafty, or do you like the sounds of Roblox? Try this pack!
You can apply this pack to any version, even if it says it's **"Outdated"**

# Sounds changed
- Button sounds
- Explosions
- Fireworks
- Drink sounds ([Refrence](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=thqDuJWEyMU&ab_channel=GameTips))
- Death sound
- Music
- The fuse tnt sound ([Refrence](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyYe5DZJtJ0&ab_channel=RobloxGearSounds))
- Sword attack sounds ([Refrence](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vYU1L3tJiOM&ab_channel=GameTips))
- Challenge complete sounds
- Fall damage sounds
